supervisor_prompt: Continue from the current /home/martinkavik/repos/boon-gleam repo state and implement BOON_GLEAM_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md as the canonical source of truth. Follow the plan phase by phase, starting at the earliest incomplete phase, and do not skip an acceptance gate. Treat the target scope as the full boon-gleam implementation contract: pinned Gleam/OTP toolchain, corpus import, compiler frontend, SourceShape, FlowIR, generated pure core, BoonGleamRuntimeHost, expected runner, terminal Pong v0, backend durability, Arkanoid v1, Lustre durable client, BUILD.bn, definitions of done, and structural guardrails. Use other Boon/Raybox repos only as supporting references where the plan explicitly leaves room for implementation detail; do not let them override this plan. Make reasonable decisions without asking unless blocked by missing credentials, unavailable external services, or an actual product decision not covered by the plan. Run the relevant checks after each meaningful step and fix breakage before moving on. If flaky automation, tooling, verification scripts, or test harnesses slow progress or make validation unreliable, fix them too when that helps development move faster and more reliably. If the implementation path starts looking too complex, too hacky, circular, or like local workaround chasing, step back, reconsider the plan, and choose a simpler or more general direction that better matches the source-of-truth contract. Stop only when the full plan is done or at a real blocker; if stopping, leave the repo coherent, commit-worthy if possible, and report the exact current phase, evidence, blocker, and next command.
completion_prompt: Do not implement anything new yet. Verify the current /home/martinkavik/repos/boon-gleam repo state against BOON_GLEAM_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md as the canonical source of truth. Check each required outcome using real files and real command results, starting with Phase 0 and continuing through the definitions of done and structural guardrails. Confirm the selected toolchain and pinned dependencies, corpus import contract, CLI commands, schema/report files, compiler pipeline, SourceShape, generated package boundaries, BoonGleamRuntimeHost, expected runner semantics, terminal smoke gates, backend API/durability semantics, web target boundaries, BUILD.bn/VFS contract, and guardrail searches. Run the relevant checks, tests, and tooling that exist in the current repo; if a required command or file does not exist yet, report it as a gap instead of treating it as pass. Do not claim completion without concrete evidence. If incomplete, list gaps by phase with exact next steps and commands. If complete, provide a milestone-by-milestone report with commit/status, command output summaries, report paths, and any residual risks.
